div.div:
Semantics (as defined in Section 2.3)
E1: strong evidence support (explicit EHR record)
E2: weak evidence support (indirect / inferable)
E3: no evidence support (not mentioned; still problematic)
E4: evidence conflict (contradicts EHR facts)
